state_definition: Canary armed but feed preflight failed — no real orders allowed

allowed_states.ARMED_AND_LIVE_AUTHORIZED_WAITING_FOR_BU: Canary armed, feed ready, all gates green, waiting for BTC 15m DOWN ask to enter 3-8¢ bucket
allowed_states.ARMED_BUT_FEED_BLOCKED: Canary armed but feed preflight failed — no real orders allowed
allowed_states.WAITING_FOR_BUCKET: Feed ready but canary not yet armed or bucket not touched
allowed_states.ORDER_SUBMITTED: Real order has been submitted to CLOB
allowed_states.POSITION_OPEN: Canary position is open and being monitored
allowed_states.HALTED: Canary halted due to risk limit, error, or manual stop
